title.raw: QR Table Ordering for Newcastle Restaurants and Cafes
title.rendered: QR Table Ordering for Newcastle Restaurants and Cafes

content.raw:
Phone: 02 40755307

QR Table Ordering for Newcastle Restaurants and Cafes

Let your customers order from their phone — no app download, no waiting for a waiter. QR table ordering with Square means faster service, fewer errors, and higher average order values.

How It Works

  1. Customer scans — a unique QR code on each table opens your menu in their browser
  2. They browse and order — full menu with photos, modifiers, and dietary info
  3. Order hits your POS — appears instantly on your Square POS and kitchen printer
  4. Payment at table or counter — flexible options to suit your workflow

Benefits for Your Venue

  • Faster table turnover — customers order when they're ready, not when staff are free
  • Fewer mistakes — orders go straight from the customer to the kitchen, no miscommunication
  • Higher spend — digital menus with photos and suggested add-ons increase average order value
  • Less pressure on staff — waitstaff focus on service quality, not order-taking
  • Works for any venue size — from a 10-seat cafe to a 200-seat pub

What We Deliver

  • Table groups configured in Square
  • Unique QR codes generated for each table
  • Print-ready QR code assets (for table tents, stickers, or acrylic stands)
  • Menu optimised for mobile ordering (item names, descriptions, photos)
  • Order flow tested end-to-end before go-live

Part of the Square Setup Package

QR table ordering is included in our Newcastle Restaurant Square Setup. We configure everything during the standard 7–10 day process.

View the Full Square Setup Package
